channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Officials lift evacuation orders for some California residents living near a damaged chemical tank
item.description: Emergency officials have lifted an evacuation order for some of the tens of thousands of people who live near a damaged tank containing a hazardous chemical in Southern California.

item.title: Trump will see doctors for his annual physical. What the public finds out is up to him
America’s schools face a backlash on digital devices as screens saturate classrooms
